dialogue_text: and at its edge is the same great desert that surrounds this Land of Oz. I'm afraid, my dear, you will have to live with us.
source_excerpt: "The North is my home," said the old lady, "and at its edge is the same great desert that surrounds this Land of Oz. I'm afraid, my dear, you will have to live with us."
